## Goal

<!-- One or two sentences: what this enables and why it matters. Link the PLAN.md
section or milestone it belongs to. -->

## Scope

<!-- What the change actually touches. Keep it to one shippable PR where possible;
split larger arcs into a tracking issue + sub-issues. -->

## Done when

<!-- Concrete, checkable criteria. For engine work this usually includes: -->

- [ ] Behaviour verified (test, screenshot, or bench as appropriate)
- [ ] `cargo test --all`, clippy, and rustfmt green
- [ ] Perf-relevant change: a BENCHMARKS.md row recorded (see the performance discipline in CLAUDE.md)
